nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 花头鹦鹉
nodes.summary: 花头鹦鹉（Blossom-headed parakeet，学名 Psittacula roseata），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于东南亚、泰国，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 东南亚
nodes.summary: 东南亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联160种鸟类，包括棉鳧、琵嘴鸭、勺嘴鹬等160种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 泰国
nodes.summary: 泰国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联251种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、銹紅林鷓鴣、环颈山鹧鸪等251种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It has a lime green body and a pink or bluish grey-head and is found in Southeast Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |date=2020 |title=Blossom-headed Parakeet (Psittacula roseata), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/blhpar3/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.blhpar3.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }} The blossom-headed parakeet inhabits lowland and foothill open forests. It occurs in altitudes around 1500m and in light forests such as savannas, secondary growth forests, forest edges, clearings, and cultivated areas. In Thailand, the blossom-headed parakeet is common in cultivated land and forest outskirts

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2020 |title=Blossom-headed Parakeet (Psittacula roseata), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/blhpar3/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.blhpar3.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }} The blossom-headed parakeet inhabits lowland and foothill open forests. It occurs in altitudes around 1500m and in light forests such as savannas, secondary growth forests, forest edges, clearings, and cultivated areas. In Thailand, the blossom-headed parakeet is common in cultivated land and forest outskirts

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The blossom-headed parakeet was classified as near threatened by the IUCN Red List in 2013 because of its moderately rapid decline from trapping and habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: roseata in Kaziranga National Park, Northeast India (2020)]]The species is vulnerable to habitat loss especially in degraded lowland deciduous dipterocarp forests. Human pressures such as agricultural land conversion, hunting, and climate change increase disturbances to blossom-headed parakeet habitats

links.label: 受威胁于

Human pressures such as agricultural land conversion, hunting, and climate change increase disturbances to blossom-headed parakeet habitats
